professional_base.node: rect, circle, ellipse, polygon, path, g.actor rect, g.note rect, g.box rect, .pieCircle, .mindmap-node rect, .er.entityBox, g.classGroup rect, g.stateGroup rect { stroke-width: 2px !important; filter: drop-shadow(2px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)) !important; }
professional_base.label: .label, .messageText, .pieTitleText, .mindmap-node text, .er.entityLabel, g.classGroup text, g.stateGroup text { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 500 !important; letter-spacing: 0.3px !important; }
professional_base.cluster: .cluster rect, g.box rect { fill-opacity: 0.05 !important; filter: none !important; stroke-dasharray: 6 6 !important; stroke-width: 1.5px !important; }

tech_dark.node: rect, circle, ellipse, polygon, path, g.actor rect, g.note rect, g.box rect, .pieCircle, .mindmap-node rect, .er.entityBox, g.classGroup rect, g.stateGroup rect { stroke-width: 2px !important; filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 8px rgba(88,166,255,0.4)) !important; }
tech_dark.label: .label, .messageText, .pieTitleText, .mindmap-node text, .er.entityLabel, g.classGroup text, g.stateGroup text { font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace !important; letter-spacing: 0.5px !important; }
tech_dark.cluster: .cluster rect, g.box rect { fill-opacity: 0.08 !important; filter: none !important; stroke-dasharray: 4 4 !important; stroke-width: 1px !important; }
